idea-plugin.name: marimo
idea-plugin.description:
Open and run marimo notebooks in PyCharm — and in IntelliJ IDEA and other JetBrains IDEs with the Python plugin installed.

marimo notebooks are stored as plain Python files. This plugin opens them in a full marimo editor inside the IDE — reactive cells, interactive UI widgets, SQL cells, the variables and dependency panels, and the built-in package manager — all in a dedicated notebook tab. Files that aren't marimo notebooks open in the normal Python editor.

Requires uv on your PATH.

group.description: Start an AI harness paired on this marimo notebook, or copy its prompt
